channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🟡 Dossier 2026-05-12 — NORMAL · Gold: MSCI
item.description:
🟡 NORMAL · SPY ▲ 0.2% · VIX 18.8

The market's acting like a dead fish today; VIX is a vanilla 18.

🥇 Gold Pick: MSCI — Score: 43/100 (A)

📡 158 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"Progress, not perfection. Your P&L doesn't have to be perfect — it has to be honest." — Sam
